Ntc Of Petition And Petition To Compel Arbitration And Request To Stay Judicial Proceedings
Off Calendar Jul-18-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Aleksandr A. Volkov, Esq., Tel. 415.987.7000, appearing for defendants and moving party.

No other appearance. The court vacated its tentative ruling. At the request of counsel present and pursuant to parties' stipulation, DEFENDANT TODD MAVIS' Petition To Compel Arbitration And Request To Stay Judicial Proceedings is ordered off calendar by the court. A stipulation and order was signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported.
